title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 226.134 - Projects funded by bonds to conform with priorities of 1992 plan, exception
text:
226.134.  Projects funded by bonds to conform with priorities of 1992 plan, exception. — All projects funded by bonds authorized in section 226.133 shall be funded in conformity with the priorities established in the 1992 plan developed by the transportation department.
(L. 1993 1st Ex. Sess. H.B. 2 § 5, A.L. 2000 H.B. 1742)
